task: OAuth Flow Integration Tests with MSW Mocking

architecture.architectureNotes: Service implements OAuth 2.0 with PKCE, state parameter CSRF protection, token refresh, and expiry handling

steps: Task classified as BUG_FIX (code exists, needs comprehensive tests)
Context identified: VSCode extension with proper service structure
Code examined: 424 lines covering OAuth 2.0 full flow
Services verified: OAuthProvider is canonical location, no duplicates
Testing infrastructure: MSW for HTTP, vscode mocks, TestCleanupManager ready
4-path coverage planned: Happy (full flow), Sad (user denies), Edge (token refresh), Error (network)

findings.codeQuality: HIGH - Well-structured OAuth implementation with PKCE and CSRF protection
findings.testingGaps: CRITICAL - No OAuth flow integration tests exist

testCases.name: HAPPY PATH: Complete OAuth flow
testCases.description: User authorizes → token exchange succeeds → session stored

testCases.name: HAPPY PATH: Retrieve existing session
testCases.description: Session exists and valid → getSessions returns it

testCases.name: HAPPY PATH: Session expiry check and auto-refresh
testCases.description: Token expired → auto-refresh triggers → new token obtained

testCases.name: SAD PATH: User denies authorization
testCases.description: OAuth endpoint returns error → createSession rejects

testCases.name: EDGE PATH: Token refresh fails
testCases.description: Refresh fails → session remains valid until manual re-auth

testCases.name: ERROR PATH: Network timeout during token exchange
testCases.description: Network timeout → error thrown and handled gracefully

testCases.name: ERROR PATH: Invalid PKCE code verifier
testCases.description: Wrong code verifier → token exchange fails

testCases.name: ERROR PATH: Session removal
testCases.description: removeSession clears stored session and state

mswStrategy.description: Mock Service Worker for all HTTP calls

scenarios: Timeout: Delayed response to test timeout logic

nonHttpMocks: vscode.env.openExternal() - verify called with correct URL
